scripts.generate:data: npm run generate:data-types && npm run generate:data-validators && npm run generate:derived && npm run generate:manifest
scripts.build: npm run check:data-generated && npm run test:assets && npm run typecheck && vite build && npm run audit:dist
scripts.test: npm run test:data && npm run test:scripts
scripts.test:scripts: node --test test/scripts.test.cjs test/data-pipeline.test.cjs test/app-state-controller.test.js test/theme-system.test.cjs && python3 -m unittest discover -s test -p 'test_*.py'
scripts.test:unit: npm run check:data-generated && npm run build:charts && npm run typecheck && npm run test:hygiene && npm run test:data && npm run test:charts && npm run test:search && npm run test:tables && npm run test:scripts
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:assets && node scripts/run_tests_with_coverage.cjs && npm run test:ui && node scripts/v8_coverage_report.cjs && node scripts/check_coverage.cjs
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:unit && VITE_BASE_PATH=/Darling/ npm run build && npm run audit:dist && npm run test:ui:preview
